rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"Chore tasks can still have meaningful build verification — the build stage here confirmed decompose creates worktrees and triggers parallel builds even when source files pre-exist.","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"convention","text":"The decompose pipeline requires complexity_score >= 4 and decomposable: true to trigger sub-task splitting; these thresholds are enforced in status.json.","scope":"kody"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Decompose expects 2+ sub-tasks, parallel builds, and a PR body with a 'Decomposed Implementation' section as part of its verification contract.","scope":"kody"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Without prior decompose runs, globbing for decompose log files in the task directory will return nothing — logs only appear after decompose executes.","scope":"kody"}]}
